---
title: "Nur M. Shahir"
about: 
    template: jolla
    image: images/avatar.jpg
    links:
        - icon: github
          text: Github
          href: https://github.com/nmshahir
---
*Translational Bioinformatician*

## Education

PhD in Bioinformatics and Computational Biology, University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill | 2020

MS Statistics, University of Maryland, Baltimore County | 2013

BSc Mathematics, Massachusetts Institute of Technology | 2010

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.
